inputs.label: Electric Field X-component (Ex)
inputs.businessContext: X component of the electric field vector in volts per meter

inputs.label: Electric Field Y-component (Ey)
inputs.businessContext: Y component of the electric field vector in volts per meter

inputs.label: Electric Field Z-component (Ez)
inputs.businessContext: Z component of the electric field vector in volts per meter

inputs.label: Magnetic Field X-component (Hx)
inputs.businessContext: X component of the magnetic field intensity vector in amperes per meter

inputs.label: Magnetic Field Y-component (Hy)
inputs.businessContext: Y component of the magnetic field intensity vector in amperes per meter

inputs.label: Magnetic Field Z-component (Hz)
inputs.businessContext: Z component of the magnetic field intensity vector in amperes per meter

formulas.magnitude: Math.sqrt(Math.pow(Ey * Hz - Ez * Hy, 2) + Math.pow(Ez * Hx - Ex * Hz, 2) + Math.pow(Ex * Hy - Ey * Hx, 2))
